mapper.select: SELECT tor.instructor_name, tor.teaching_years, tor.photo, tor.good_subject, tor.score, car.car_id, car.car_name, car.`status`, car.plate_number, car.car_color FROM driving_instructor AS tor LEFT JOIN driving_car AS car ON tor.instructor_id = car.instructor_id WHERE tor.`status` = '0' AND car.`status` = '0' LIMIT 1;
